title: Manufacturing Engineer - Pidilite Industries - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Pidilite Industries - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
